title: CIEN Stock Ciena (CIEN, $116.92) soared +60.78% and reached a 3-month high
author: tickeron_community
selftext: [Ciena](https://tickeron.com/ticker/CIEN/) ([CIEN](https://tickeron.com/ticker/CIEN/), $116.92) gained +60.78% and reached a new high over the last three months. By comparison, the broader [Telecommunications Equipment](https://tickeron.com/tags/all/Industry-TelecommunicationsEquipment) Industry returned 45.58% over the same period of time. A.I.dvisor analyzed 85 stocks in the [Telecommunications Equipment](https://tickeron.com/tags/all/Industry-TelecommunicationsEquipment) Industry over the same period of time and found that 71 of them (83.33%) were in an Uptrend while 14 of them (16.67%) showed a Downtrend.
